customer_types.name: Digital Urban Innovators
customer_types.description: Tech-savvy professionals seeking integrated financial solutions that bridge digital transactions with real-world mobility and property investments.

personas.description: 30-year-old tech consultant interested in efficient financial ecosystems and smart city solutions

{
  "query": "Payment protection features for remote service providers in Web3/Blockchain/Cryptocurrency",
  "response": {
    "features": [
      {
        "name": "Escrow Services",
        "description": "Escrow services hold payment until the service is completed and approved by both parties. Smart contract-based escrow automates this on the blockchain, ensuring transparency and immutability. Platforms like Arbiterz.com specifically focus on crypto-based escrow, offering dispute resolution services for added protection. Competitors include traditional escrow services outside of Web3 and centralized services like Upwork which also has dispute resolution.",

          "Dispute resolution mechanisms."

          "Smart Contract-based escrow (general)",

        ]

          "Regular feedback and progress checks.",

  "query": "Payment protection features for remote service providers in Web3/Blockchain/Cryptocurrency",

    "features": [
      {
        "name": "Escrow Services",
        "description": "Escrow services hold payment until the service is completed and approved by both parties. Smart contract-based escrow automates this on the blockchain, ensuring transparency and immutability. Platforms like Arbiterz.com specifically focus on crypto-based escrow, offering dispute resolution services for added protection. Competitors include traditional escrow services outside of Web3 and centralized services like Upwork which also has dispute resolution.",

          "Regular feedback and progress checks.",
